items.title: havent seen many people outside anthropic ultracode yet.
items.title_zh: 还没见过人类超码之外的很多人。
items.description: havent seen many people outside anthropic ultracode yet. this thing is scarily good at burning tokens but you need to set up your repo to parallelize properly to make use of the fanout that i think subagents are best at. basically the idea…
items.description_zh: 还没见过人类超码之外的很多人。这个东西非常擅长燃烧代币，但你需要设置你的存储库以正确并行化，以利用我认为子代理最擅长的扇出。基本上这个想法……

items.description: Satya on loops as IP: https://t.co/87HBsQptdQ > This is the first time we can create a real cognitive loop between people and digital systems. That is a mind-bender, because it changes how we even conceptualize work inside an enterprise. >…

items.title: Codex can see and set its own /goal.
items.title_zh: Codex 可以查看并设置自己的/目标。
items.description: Codex can see and set its own /goal. Everything we build, we build also as a tool for the agent. This is a generalization of meta prompting, where you let the agent set its own task based on your intent. https://t.co/8xyjRjFk4v
items.description_zh: Codex 可以查看并设置自己的/目标。我们构建的所有东西，也是作为代理的工具而构建的。这是元提示的概括，您可以让代理根据您的意图设置自己的任务。 https://t.co/8xyjRjFk4v

items.title: Great post.
items.description: Great post. The companies that are able to get their unique IP, institutional knowledge, and data into a format and architecture that lets them capture all of the gains and progress in AI are going to be in the best position in the future.…
items.description_zh: 很棒的帖子。那些能够将其独特的知识产权、机构知识和数据转化为一种格式和架构的公司，能够让他们捕获人工智能领域的所有收益和进步，将在未来处于最佳位置……
